title: デビュー戦の後に・ザ☆センター！

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...
Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! Be on the lookout for
more Falco!

Smart Falcon finishes first in her debut race and
manages to secure center stage for the winning
concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...It just doesn't feel real. I can hardly believe it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm super happy I got to sing in front of everyone.
It felt great to have the spotlight on me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But... that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The lights the audience was waving... They were
all for me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Their cheers, their gazes... they were all honed in
on center stage—on me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It was... amazing. Winning concerts are amazing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And being center stage is so much fun!
choice_data_list: It'll be even more exciting on a bigger stage.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're right! My debut concert was already so
much fun!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna perform on an even bigger stage! I wanna
be a top Umadol!

Her first time center stage seems to have
strengthened her resolve to reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

Smart Falcon is off to a great start and seems full
of enthusiasm while we discuss our path moving
forward.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've got a question for you! What's the first thing
a freshly-debuted Umadol has to do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nope! Well, actually, you're not entirely wrong!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But Umadols are all about practical experience!
I've gotta get more fans by putting on real
concerts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run tons of races and take center stage a
bunch of times!
choice_data_list: In that case, let's go get first place!

text_block_list.text:
Now that she's won her debut race, there's a much
greater variety of races that Smart Falcon can
compete in.

If she places first in those races, she'll naturally
attract more attention.
choice_data_list:
If we can win at least two races, I think people
will really start noticing you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay! ☆ I just gotta win, then!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's make everybody remember the
up-and-coming Umadol, Falco! ♪

We set our sights on winning at least two races at
the Pre-Open level or higher during junior year to
jump-start Smart Falcon's fame.
